race.comment: FLOWERDALE (14) is racing well, scoring two back at Sale before finishing 1.75 lengths from the winner last time over 1400m at Sandown. She's a progressive type from a strong stable who are most likely using this as a stepping stone to bigger and better things. ARCANDAM (5) also won his first two runs this prep and although beaten last start he was only 2.35 lengths off Verdoux, who won at Flemington last weekend. DIDN'T MISS MANY (8) was a determined winner before the break. Finds a nice race for him fresh and has been readied with a jumpout win. Have to include. ACTA NON VERBA (10) also returns is drawn to advantage. Expect him to take running down if left alone in front.
